programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 37-year-old Lee Rotatori is found dead in her hotel room in 1982 with a single stab wound to the heart, police suspect the work of a professional; it takes four decades to identify her killer and, in the process, reveal a shocking truth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When Sherry Leighty goes missing in 1999, her family is left wondering how a dedicated mother of three could vanish without a trace; a decade later, the cold case heats up when Sherry's sister launches a social media campaign.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In early 1984, 3-year-old Vanessa Bennett becomes the lone survivor of her family's brutal murder; initial investigators suspect a serial killer is at large, but decades pass before DNA narrows the suspect pool to one man.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Just after the last day of school in 1984, 15-year-old Reesa Trexler is found murdered in her grandparents' home; for decades, a stalled investigation only fuels the town rumor mill, pointing an accusing finger at Reesa's 13-year-old sister, Jodie.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Tonya McKinley is found brutally murdered on New Year's Day 1985, a boy is left motherless; a family waits 35 years for advancements in forensic science to finally catch a killer using familial DNA.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July 1997, the brutal murder of 19-year-old Tiffany Johnston rocks the small town of Bethany, Okla.; DNA evidence points to her killer over a decade later and leads to the buried bodies of two other missing women in Texas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.sub-title: Terror in Telluride; Signature of a Killer
programme.desc: A tipster's call helps solve the murder of the heir to the U-Haul fortune; new fingerprint technology helps solve a decades-old murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Forensic clay modeling helps investigators identify a murder victim; two boys perform satanic rituals and set fires.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A killer of four goes free until a detective finds key evidence on a coffee cup.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A single mom is attacked by an old classmate after spurning his affections; a gold prospector survives five days in the Australian Outback; a woman is left for dead after being shot in a carjacking.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A woman survives three shotgun wounds to the head; a family is attacked by bees; a school library shooting rampage.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A woman is terrorized in her apartment; a man is attacked by a grizzly bear; a 16 year old girl is abducted at knife point.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A man is attacked by a grizzly bear in a remote forest area; a woman engages in a gun battle with three masked men who invade her home; a woman is assaulted by a man posing as a maintenance worker.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: Justina Rucinski receives an email with the largest cookie request of her career; but when the customer arrives at her home to leave the deposit, Justina is brutally attacked and taken away at gunpoint; April recalls what happened to her best friend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: When Becky Koster returns home from a night out, she texts her mother, Barbara, that she made it back safely; however, when Barbara arrived home hours later, Becky was nowhere to be found; Barbara recalls the gut-wrenching search for her daughter.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: The family of Kenia Monge share the agonizing details of what happened around the beautiful 19-year-old's disappearance; her father, sister and authorities explain how the texts in Kenia's cell phone were the impetus to finding her abductor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: The NOLA EMS team celebrates the opening of its new headquarters; Titus, now an official paramedic, adjusts to new shared roles with his longtime partner, Dan; new teammates Arcady and Ted get to know each other's styles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: With COVID-19 raging across the city, the New Orleans EMS responders face a series of crises that include a vehicle rollover from a police pursuit, a victim with close-range gunshot wounds, and a race to save a woman in respiratory distress.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
